name: KMLocationSDKXiOS
summary: Kakao Mobility Location SDK for iOS - provides location tracking and navigation services.
description:
KMLocationSDKX is Kakao Mobility's iOS SDK for location-based services.
It provides comprehensive location tracking, navigation, and mapping capabilities
for iOS applications. Supports iOS 15.0+ and Apple Silicon Macs.
